easy.description: Clean an employee dataset by: 1) Removing duplicate rows, 2) Renaming columns to snake_case format. Call finish when done.

medium.description: Clean a customer dataset by: 1) Filling missing values using correct strategy (mean for numeric, mode for categorical), 2) Fixing data types (age, purchases, salary must be numeric). Call finish when done.

hard.description: Clean an orders dataset by running a full pipeline: 1) Remove duplicate orders, 2) Fill missing values, 3) Fix data types, 4) Remove outliers in quantity and price columns, 5) Validate final schema. Call finish when done.

expert.description: Clean a sales dataset by running a complete expert pipeline: 1) Remove duplicate transactions, 2) Standardize region values to Title Case, 3) Fill missing values correctly, 4) Fix all data types, 5) Remove outliers in sale_amount, 6) Rename all columns to snake_case, 7) Validate final schema. This task requires correct ORDER of operations. Call finish when done.
